title: Best Film Comedy/Musical Actress - 2026 Golden Globes
text: Best Film Comedy/Musical Actress - 2026 Golden Globes. Winner: Rose Byrne for 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You'. According to the Golden Globes winners list, Rose Byrne took home the award in this category. The other nominees included Cynthia Erivo ('Wicked: For Good'), Kate Hudson ('Song Sung Blue'), Chase Infiniti ('One Battle After Another'), Amanda Seyfried ('The Testament of Ann Lee'), and Emma Stone ('Bugonia'). This was Byrne's first Golden Globe win after multiple previous nominations.
